title: Cole Manufacturing
description: ***.com zoominfo.com/c/cole-manufacturing-corp/344188464 Cole Manufacturing is a specialized metal fabrication and custom tooling company based in West Bend, Wisconsin, dedicated to delivering high-quality, cost-effective solutions for the metal forming industry.They offer a comprehensive range of services, including precision tool and die making, metal stamping, prototyping, and both manual and robotic welding.With versatile capabilities and advanced equipment, the company expertly handles projects of any size, providing reliable manufacturing support from custom fixtures to high-volume production runs
